label: Wednesday
definition: The thrid day of a calendar week starting from Monday.  Wednesday is after Tuesday and before Thursday.

label: Thursday
definition: The fourth day of a calendar week starting from Monday. Thursday is after Wednesday and before Friday.

label: Monday
definition: The first day of a calendar week starting from Monday. Monday is after Sunday and before Tuesday.

label: Tuesday
definition: The second day of a calendar week starting from Monday. Tuesday is after Monday and before Wednesday.

label: Friday
definition: The fifth day of a calendar week starting from Monday. Friday is after Thursday and before Saturday.

label: Saturday
definition: The sixth day of a calendar week starting from Monday. Saturday is after Friday and before Sunday.

label: Sunday
definition: The last day of a calendar week starting from Monday. Sunday is after Saturday and before the Monday next week.

label: Christmas
definition: December 25

label: Independence_Day
definition: July 4

label: Thanksgiving_Day
definition: Fourth Thursday in November

label: Columbus_Day
definition: Second Monday in October. Start 1937

label: Inauguration_Day
definition: First January 20th following a Presidential election

label: Labor_Day
definition: First Monday in September. became a federal holiday in 1894

label: Birthday_Of_Martin_Luther_King,_Jr.
definition: Honors Martin Luther King, Jr., Civil Rights leader, who was actually born on January 15, 1929; combined with other holidays in several states. First occured 1986.

label: New_Year's_Day
definition: Celebrates beginning of the Gregorian calendar year. Festivities include counting down to midnight (12:00 AM) on the preceding night, New Year's Eve. Traditional end of holiday season.

label: Washington's_Birthday
definition: Third Monday in February

label: Veterans_Day
definition: November 11

label: Memorial_Day
definition: Last Monday in May

label: Gender
definition:
Gender
 UMLS CUI: C0079399
 Semantic Types
 :
 Organism Attribute
 Definitions (6)
 Socially-constructed identity of male or female. (MSH)
 The assemblage of properties that distinguish people on the basis of the societal roles expected for the two sexes. (NCI)
 Subject self-identification re: masculine/feminine. [IOM] See also sex. (NCI)
 https://uts.nlm.nih.gov/uts/umls/concept/C0079399

label: Biological_Sex
definition:
sex
 UMLS CUI: C1522384
 Semantic Types
 :
 Organism Attribute
 Definitions (9)
 The totality of characteristics of reproductive structure, functions, PHENOTYPE, and GENOTYPE, differentiating the MALE from the FEMALE organism. (MSH)
 The assemblage of physical properties or qualities by which male is distinguished from female; the physical difference between male and female; the distinguishing peculiarity of male or female. (NCI)
 Phenotypic expression of chromosomal makeup that defines a study subject as male, female, or other. Compare to gender. (NCI)
 The biologic character or quality that distinguishes male and female from one another as expressed by analysis of the person's gonadal, morphologic (internal and external), chromosomal, and hormonal characteristics. (NCI)
 Conceptually broad term referring to the structural, functional, or behavioral characteristics of males and females of a given species. Use a more specific term if possible. For comparisons of the sexes use HUMAN SEX DIFFERENCES or ANIMAL SEX DIFFERENCES. (PSY)
 Totality of characteristics of reproductive structure, functions, phenotype, and genotype, differentiating the male from the female organism; do not confuse with the act of sex, which is indexed with SEX BEHAVIOR. (CSP)
 https://uts.nlm.nih.gov/uts/umls/concept/C1522384

label: Female
definition:
Females
 UMLS CUI: C0086287
 Semantic Types
 :
 Organism Attribute
 Definitions (5)
 A person who belongs to the sex that normally produces ova. The term is used to indicate biological sex distinctions, or cultural gender role distinctions, or both. (NCI) (NCI)
 A person who belongs to the sex that normally produces ova. The term is used to indicate biological sex distinctions, or cultural gender role distinctions, or both. (NCI)
 An individual who reports belonging to the cultural gender role distinction of female. (NCI)
 Female
 (HL7V3.0)
 Use in conjunction with a disease, disorder, dysfunction, body system, or function which is gender specific. (CSP)
 https://uts.nlm.nih.gov/uts/umls/concept/C0086287

label: Male
definition:
Males
 UMLS CUI: C0086582
 Semantic Types
 :
 Organism Attribute
 Definitions (5)
 A person who belongs to the sex that normally produces sperm. The term is used to indicate biological sex distinctions, cultural gender role distinctions, or both. (NCI)
 A person who belongs to the sex that normally produces sperm. The term is used to indicate biological sex distinctions, cultural gender role distinctions, or both. (NCI) (NCI)
 Male
 (HL7V3.0)
 Used for all-male populations when sex is pertinent to the focus of the study. For comparison of sexes use HUMAN SEX DIFFERENCES. (PSY)

label: Gender_Identity
definition:
UMLS CUI: C0017249
 Semantic Types
 :
 Mental Process
 Definitions (10)
 A person's concept of self as being male and masculine or female and feminine, or ambivalent, based in part on physical characteristics, parental responses, and psychological and social pressures. It is the internal experience of gender role. (MSH)
 A person's internally held sense of their gender, which may or may not correspond to the individual's genotypic or phenotypic sex. (NCI)
 The state of being a specific person in regard to sexuality and/or gender (NANDA-I) Acknowledgment and acceptance of own sexual identity (NOC)
 Inner conviction that one is male or female or inner sense of being masculine or feminine. (PSY)
 https://uts.nlm.nih.gov/uts/umls/concept/C0017249

label: Marital_Status
definition:
Marital Status
 UMLS CUI: C0024819
 Semantic Types
 :
 Finding
 Definitions (8)
 A demographic parameter indicating a person's status with respect to marriage, divorce, widowhood, singleness, etc. (MSH)
 A demographic parameter indicating a person's current conjugal status. (NCI)
 The domestic partnership status of a person. EXAMPLE(S): For the U.S. Census 2000: Now Married, Widowed, Separated, Divorced, Never Married OTHER NAME(S): NOTE(S): (NCI)
 https://uts.nlm.nih.gov/uts/umls/concept/C0024819

label: Race
definition:
Ethnicity
 UMLS CUI: C0015031
 Semantic Types
 :
 Population Group
 Definitions (8)
 A group of people with a common cultural heritage that sets them apart from others in a variety of social relationships. (MSH)
 A social group characterized by a distinctive social and cultural tradition that is maintained from generation to generation. Members share a common history and origin and a sense of identification with the group. They have similar and distinctive features in their lifestyle habits and shared experiences. They often have a common genetic heritage which may be reflected in their experience of health and disease. (NCI)
 Denotes social groups with a shared history, sense of identity, geography, and cultural roots. (NCI)
 https://uts.nlm.nih.gov/uts/umls/concept/C0015031

label: Men_Who_Have_Sex_with_Men
definition:

 :
 Population Group
 Definitions (1)
 Men who engage in sexual activity with other men, regardless of how they identify themselves. (NCI)

label: Walkability
definition: EPA National Walkability Index ranking neighborhoods on walkability characteristics such as intersection density, transit proximity, and employment mix. [SPACESCANS-local extension — pending merge into SPACEO]

label: Neighborhood_Deprivation_Index
definition: Composite measure of neighborhood-level socioeconomic deprivation derived from US Census ACS variables. [SPACESCANS-local extension — pending merge into SPACEO]

label: Community_Organization_Density
definition: Per-capita density of community organization categories (religious, civic, business, etc.) from US Census ZIP Business Patterns. [SPACESCANS-local extension — pending merge into SPACEO]

label: Road_Proximity
definition: Distance from a residence to the nearest TIGER/Line primary, secondary, and combined primary+secondary roads. [SPACESCANS-local extension — pending merge into SPACEO]

label: Bluespace
definition: Distance from a residence to the nearest NHD surface-water feature (flowline, waterbody, area feature, coastline, and combined blue feature). [SPACESCANS-local extension — pending merge into SPACEO]
